invariant_title: Session is the primary runtime abstraction
Exactly one authoritative live owner exists per session
Session timelines are append-only and event-sourced
Side effects launch only from committed intent via an outbox
Per-session total order is mandatory
Heavy model, browser, and media work must stay off BEAM schedulers
Workers never own authoritative state
Humans and approvals are first-class runtime participants
Every effectful action crosses an explicit policy boundary
Every external side effect has an idempotency strategy
Checkpoints are mandatory
Replay must not require re-executing the world
Owners self-fence on lease ambiguity
Artifact blobs do not transit the control plane
Cross-language contracts are explicit and versioned
Tenant and workspace scoping are universal
The runtime must be inspectable by design
Sidecars over NIFs for hot paths
Browser writes are dangerous by default
Direct worker writes to canonical tables are forbidden
